mapper.select: SELECT b.dict_label as dictLabel, COUNT(a.type) as count FROM sys_dict_data b LEFT JOIN healthbrain_enterprise a ON a.type = b.dict_value WHERE b.dict_type = 'brain_enterprise_type' GROUP BY b.dict_label

SELECT b.dict_label as dictLabel, COUNT(a_split.dev_value) as count FROM sys_dict_data b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRIM(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(CONCAT('["', REPLACE(a.development, ',', '","'), '"]'), CONCAT('$[', idx, ']')))) as dev_value FROM healthbrain_enterprise a JOIN ( SELECT 0 as idx UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 ) numbers WHERE a.development IS NOT NULL AND a.development != '' ) a_split ON a_split.dev_value = b.dict_value WHERE b.dict_type = 'brain_enterprise_development' GROUP BY b.dict_label
